headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) After Strong Multi‑Year Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies at around US$248 per share still offers value, the starting point is understanding what the current price actually reflects. The stock has returned 4.4% over the last week, 14.8% year to date, and 33.0% over the past year, with a 5.6% decline over the last 30 days and very large gains across the past 3 and 5 years. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in rail and transportation equipment, including investor...

headline: Rothschild & Co Upgrades Westinghouse Air Brake to Buy, Raises Price Target to $285
summary: Rothschild & Co  analyst Oliver Holmes   upgrades Westinghouse Air Brake (NYSE:WAB) from Neutral to Buy and raises the price target from $262 to $285.
